missing_steps: Installation of Pressure Reducing Valves (PRVs) to manage high pressure on lower floors in multi-story distribution
Representation of backflow preventers or double-check valves to ensure zero cross-contamination between treated flushing water and potable domestic water systems

mcqs.question: What does the abbreviation 'SLD' stand for in plumbing engineering?
Why are Domestic Water Supply (DWS) and Flushing Water Supply (FWS) kept separate in modern building systems?
options: To prevent contamination of potable water with treated/recycled flushing water
To maximize water pressure at upper levels
Because domestic water cannot be stored in overhead tanks
mcqs.answer: To prevent contamination of potable water with treated/recycled flushing water
